prompt: Create a vertical high-fashion editorial portrait of an elegant androgynous model posed from the waist up against a richly textured abstract impasto oil-painting backdrop. The color story is dominated by deep crimson, burgundy, black, muted brown, and touches of antique gold. The model has short glossy black hair, bare shoulders, and wears a dramatic sculptural voluminous off-shoulder red satin gown with oversized folded sleeves, heavy draped fabric, deep shadows, and a glossy couture sheen. The pose is three-quarter turned, one shoulder exposed, one arm gathered near the chest as if holding the fabric closed, with the gown sweeping diagonally across the frame. The face is intentionally anonymized by a large centered square blur/solid gradient mask covering the facial features, blending from dark near the hairline to warm skin tone below, while ears and hair remain partially visible. Background: thick palette-knife strokes and layered paint ridges in red, wine, umber, black, and metallic gold, expressive and tactile like an abstract expressionist canvas. Lighting is dramatic studio lighting from the upper left, emphasizing satin highlights, skin glow, and deep fabric folds. Composition is tight, luxurious, and painterly, with no text, no watermark, no jewelry, and no extra people.
